apiResourceId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the owning API resource.

type.description: Gets or sets the claim type.

ApiResourceClaimDto.description: Represents a user claim type associated with an API resource.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the API resource.

nonEditable.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the API resource is non-editable.

lastAccessed.description: Gets or sets the date and time the API resource was last accessed.

updated.description: Gets or sets the date and time the API resource was last updated.

name.description: Gets or sets the unique name of the API resource.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the display name shown for the API resource.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the API resource is enabled.

created.description: Gets or sets the date and time the API resource was created.

ApiResourceDto.description: Detailed representation of an API resource.

apiResourceId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the owning API resource.

key.description: Gets or sets the property key.

value.description: Gets or sets the property value.

ApiResourcePropertyDto.description: Represents a custom property (key/value pair) associated with an API resource.

apiResourceId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the owning API resource.

scope.description: Gets or sets the scope name.

ApiResourceScopeDto.description: Represents a scope associated with an API resource.

apiResourceId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the owning API resource.

type.description: Gets or sets the secret type.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the secret.

expiration.description: Gets or sets the expiration of the secret.

ApiResourceSecretDto.description: Represents a secret associated with an API resource.

name.description: Gets or sets the unique name of the API resource.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the display name shown for the API resource.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the API resource is enabled.

created.description: Gets or sets the date and time the API resource was created.

ApiResourceSummaryDto.description: Summary representation of an API resource.

roleName.description: Gets or sets the name of the role to assign.

AssignUserRoleDto.description: Data used to assign a role to a user.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the client that owns the claim.

type.description: Gets or sets the type of the claim.

value.description: Gets or sets the value of the claim.

ClientClaimDto.description: Represents a claim associated with a client.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the client that owns the CORS origin.

origin.description: Gets or sets the allowed CORS origin.

ClientCorsOriginDto.description: Represents an allowed CORS origin for a client.

description.description: Gets or sets the human-readable description of the client.

clientUri.description: Gets or sets the client home page URI.

logoUri.description: Gets or sets the URI to the client logo image.

requireClientSecret.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a client secret is required to obtain tokens.

requireConsent.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user must give consent before tokens are issued.

requirePkce.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE) is required for authorization code flow.

allowPlainTextPkce.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether plain-text PKCE code challenges are allowed.

allowOfflineAccess.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the client can request refresh tokens for offline access.

allowAccessTokensViaBrowser.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether access tokens may be transmitted via the browser.

allowRememberConsent.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether prior consent decisions can be remembered for this client.

alwaysSendClientClaims.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether client claims are sent for every token request, not just client credentials flows.

alwaysIncludeUserClaimsInIdToken.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether user claims are always included in the identity token.

enableLocalLogin.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether local login is enabled for this client.

includeJwtId.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a unique JWT identifier (jti) is included in tokens.

nonEditable.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the client is read-only and cannot be edited.

updateAccessTokenClaimsOnRefresh.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether access token claims are refreshed when a refresh token is used.

backChannelLogoutSessionRequired.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a session identifier is sent on back-channel logout requests.

frontChannelLogoutSessionRequired.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a session identifier is sent on front-channel logout requests.

absoluteRefreshTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the maximum lifetime, in seconds, of a refresh token regardless of usage.

accessTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the access token lifetime in seconds.

accessTokenType.description: Gets or sets the access token type (0 = JWT, 1 = reference).

authorizationCodeLifetime.description: Gets or sets the authorization code lifetime in seconds.

deviceCodeLifetime.description: Gets or sets the device code lifetime in seconds.

identityTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the identity token lifetime in seconds.

refreshTokenExpiration.description: Gets or sets the refresh token expiration type (0 = sliding, 1 = absolute).

refreshTokenUsage.description: Gets or sets the refresh token usage type (0 = reuse, 1 = one-time only).

slidingRefreshTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the sliding refresh token lifetime in seconds.

consentLifetime.description: Gets or sets the lifetime of a remembered consent, in seconds, or `null` for no expiration.

userSsoLifetime.description: Gets or sets the maximum single sign-on session lifetime for the user, in seconds, or `null` for the global default.

backChannelLogoutUri.description: Gets or sets the URI invoked to notify the client of a back-channel logout.

clientClaimsPrefix.description: Gets or sets the prefix applied to client claim types.

frontChannelLogoutUri.description: Gets or sets the URI invoked to notify the client of a front-channel logout.

pairWiseSubjectSalt.description: Gets or sets the salt used to generate a pairwise subject identifier.

userCodeType.description: Gets or sets the user code type used for device flow.

updated.description: Gets or sets the timestamp of the last update.

lastAccessed.description: Gets or sets the timestamp the client was last accessed.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the client identifier string.

clientName.description: Gets or sets the display name.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this client is enabled.

protocolType.description: Gets or sets the protocol type.

created.description: Gets or sets the creation timestamp.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the client that owns the grant type.

grantType.description: Gets or sets the allowed grant type.

ClientGrantTypeDto.description: Represents a grant type allowed for a client.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the client that owns the identity provider restriction.

provider.description: Gets or sets the identity provider the client is restricted to.

ClientIdpRestrictionDto.description: Represents an identity provider restriction for a client.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the client that owns the post-logout redirect URI.

postLogoutRedirectUri.description: Gets or sets the post-logout redirect URI.

ClientPostLogoutRedirectUriDto.description: Represents a post-logout redirect URI for a client.

clientId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the client that owns the property.

key.description: Gets or sets the key of the property.

value.description: Gets or sets the value of the property.

scope.description: Gets or sets the scope granted to the client.

enableLocalLogin.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether local login is enabled for this client.

includeJwtId.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a unique JWT identifier (jti) is included in tokens.

nonEditable.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the client is read-only and cannot be edited.

updateAccessTokenClaimsOnRefresh.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether access token claims are refreshed when a refresh token is used.

backChannelLogoutSessionRequired.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a session identifier is sent on back-channel logout requests.

frontChannelLogoutSessionRequired.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a session identifier is sent on front-channel logout requests.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this client is enabled.

absoluteRefreshTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the maximum lifetime, in seconds, of a refresh token regardless of usage.

accessTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the access token lifetime in seconds.

accessTokenType.description: Gets or sets the access token type (0 = JWT, 1 = reference).

authorizationCodeLifetime.description: Gets or sets the authorization code lifetime in seconds.

deviceCodeLifetime.description: Gets or sets the device code lifetime in seconds.

identityTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the identity token lifetime in seconds.

refreshTokenExpiration.description: Gets or sets the refresh token expiration type (0 = sliding, 1 = absolute).

refreshTokenUsage.description: Gets or sets the refresh token usage type (0 = reuse, 1 = one-time only).

slidingRefreshTokenLifetime.description: Gets or sets the sliding refresh token lifetime in seconds.

consentLifetime.description: Gets or sets the lifetime of a remembered consent, in seconds, or `null` for no expiration.

userSsoLifetime.description: Gets or sets the maximum single sign-on session lifetime for the user, in seconds, or `null` for the global default.

backChannelLogoutUri.description: Gets or sets the URI invoked to notify the client of a back-channel logout.

clientClaimsPrefix.description: Gets or sets the prefix applied to client claim types.

frontChannelLogoutUri.description: Gets or sets the URI invoked to notify the client of a front-channel logout.

pairWiseSubjectSalt.description: Gets or sets the salt used to generate a pairwise subject identifier.

protocolType.description: Gets or sets the protocol type.

userCodeType.description: Gets or sets the user code type used for device flow.

SaveClientDto.description: Payload for creating or updating a client.

grantType.description: Gets or sets the allowed grant type.

SaveClientGrantTypeDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client grant type.

provider.description: Gets or sets the identity provider the client is restricted to.

SaveClientIdpRestrictionDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client identity provider restriction.

postLogoutRedirectUri.description: Gets or sets the post-logout redirect URI.

SaveClientPostLogoutRedirectUriDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client post-logout redirect URI.

key.description: Gets or sets the key of the property.

value.description: Gets or sets the value of the property.

SaveClientPropertyDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client property.

redirectUri.description: Gets or sets the redirect URI.

SaveClientRedirectUriDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client redirect URI.

scope.description: Gets or sets the scope granted to the client.

SaveClientScopeDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client scope.

type.description: Gets or sets the type of the secret.

value.description: Gets or sets the value of the secret.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the secret.

expiration.description: Gets or sets the expiration of the secret.

SaveClientSecretDto.description: Represents the data required to create or update a client secret.

type.description: Gets or sets the user claim type.

SaveIdentityResourceClaimDto.description: Payload used to create or update an identity resource user claim.

name.description: Gets or sets the unique name of the identity resource.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the display name shown on the consent screen.

description.description: Gets or sets the description shown on the consent screen.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the identity resource is enabled.

emphasize.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the identity resource is emphasized on the consent screen.

required.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the identity resource is required and cannot be deselected.

showInDiscoveryDocument.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the identity resource is shown in the discovery document.

nonEditable.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the identity resource is non-editable.

SaveIdentityResourceDto.description: Payload used to create or update an identity resource.

key.description: Gets or sets the property key.

value.description: Gets or sets the property value.

SaveIdentityResourcePropertyDto.description: Payload used to create or update an identity resource property.

type.description: Gets or sets the claim type.

value.description: Gets or sets the claim value.

SaveRoleClaimDto.description: Data used to create or update a claim on a role.

name.description: Gets or sets the role name.

SaveRoleDto.description: Data used to create or update an ASP.NET Core Identity role.

type.description: Gets or sets the claim type.

SaveScopeClaimDto.description: Data used to create or update a user claim on an API scope.

name.description: Gets or sets the unique name of the scope.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the display name shown to users.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the scope.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope is enabled.

emphasize.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope should be emphasized on the consent screen.

required.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope is required and cannot be deselected on the consent screen.

showInDiscoveryDocument.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope is shown in the discovery document.

SaveScopeDto.description: Data used to create or update an API scope.

key.description: Gets or sets the property key.

value.description: Gets or sets the property value.

SaveScopePropertyDto.description: Data used to create or update a custom property on an API scope.

userName.description: Gets or sets the user name.

email.description: Gets or sets the email address.

name.description: Gets or sets the display name.

phoneNumber.description: Gets or sets the phone number.

twoFactorEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled.

lockoutEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user can be locked out.

SaveUserDto.description: Data used to update an existing user.

scopeId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the scope that owns this claim.

type.description: Gets or sets the claim type.

ScopeClaimDto.description: Representation of a user claim associated with an API scope.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the scope.

emphasize.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope should be emphasized on the consent screen.

required.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope is required and cannot be deselected on the consent screen.

showInDiscoveryDocument.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope is shown in the discovery document.

name.description: Gets or sets the unique name of the scope.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the display name shown to users.

enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scope is enabled.

ScopeDto.description: Full representation of an API scope, including its detailed settings.

key.description: Gets or sets the property key.

value.description: Gets or sets the property value.

displayName.description: Gets or sets the display name shown to users.

value.description: Gets or sets the claim value.

phoneNumberConfirmed.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the phone number has been confirmed.

emailConfirmed.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the email address has been confirmed.

twoFactorEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled.

lockoutEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user can be locked out.

accessFailedCount.description: Gets or sets the number of failed access attempts.

email.description: Gets or sets the email address.
